name: skill_onedrive_file_intelligence
title: OneDrive File Intelligence
description: This skill helps users search for, retrieve, summarize, and answer questions about files in OneDrive. Use it when users ask to find documents, summarize a file, or reason over content stored in OneDrive.
summary: Search, retrieve, summarize, and answer questions about files stored in OneDrive.

name: skill_outlook_productivity
title: Outlook Productivity Assistant
description: Use this skill when a user asks to summarize inbox messages, draft or improve email replies, identify action items from email threads, or help manage calendar-related Outlook workflows.
summary: Summarize emails, draft replies, extract action items, and support calendar workflows in Outlook.

name: skill_sharepoint_knowledge_collaboration
title: SharePoint Knowledge & Collaboration Assistant
description: Use this skill when a user asks to locate, summarize, compare, or synthesize information from SharePoint pages, document libraries, folders, or team sites.
summary: Retrieve and reason over SharePoint knowledge, documents, pages, and collaboration content.

name: skill_teams_productivity
title: Teams Productivity Assistant
description: Use this skill when a user asks to summarize chats or channels, draft replies, extract decisions and action items, or support meeting follow-up and Microsoft Teams collaboration workflows.
summary: Summarize Teams chats, draft replies, extract decisions, and support collaboration workflows.

name: nebulaone-usage-analytics-workbook-builder
title: nebulaONE Usage Analytics Workbook Builder
description: Use when a nebulaONE admin uploads a standard usage export .xlsx and asks for n1 analytics, cleanup, pivots, source-only cost review, or an enhanced workbook. Never estimate pricing or generate synthetic facts.
summary: Build a source-only, auditable nebulaONE usage analytics workbook from the standard usage export.

name: nebulaone-analytics-html-dashboard-builder
title: nebulaONE Analytics Interactive HTML Dashboard Builder
description: Use when a nebulaONE admin asks for an n1 dashboard, nebulaONE dashboard, HTML visualization, shareable report, or dashboard artifact from an enhanced usage analytics workbook.
summary: Build a source-only, Cloudforce-branded interactive HTML dashboard from an enhanced nebulaONE analytics workbook.
